channel.title: Gabriel E. Lima
channel.description: Recent content on Gabriel E. Lima

item.title: About
item.description: Hello! My name is Gabriel Eduardo Lima, I’m 20 years old and I’m from Pomerode - small city in Santa Catarina state, in south of Brazil. I’m currently enrolled in an undergraduate course in Computer Science, offered by IFC - Campus Blumenau. After completing the course, I aim to develop an academic career joining a graduate program. Topics of interest Link to heading Artificial Intelligence, focusing in Machine Learning Computer Vision Image processing Educational Background Link to heading Simple box B.

item.title: First post
item.description: The first post will be posted soon… You are welcome to come back later check it!

item.title: DRØMME: A 2D shooting game proposal
item.description: Basic info Link to heading Type: High school project (technician course) Period: Year 2018 Area: Game development Authors: Gabriel Eduardo Lima, Guilherme Eduardo Kuglin, Thiago Vinicius de Oliveira Hornburg e Timóteo Rafael Janzen Instructors: Adriano Pessini, Eder Augusto Penharbel e Ricardo de la Rocha Ladeira About Link to heading DRØMME consists of a simple 2D shooting game. It is set in a post-zombie apocalypse world, where the player must face and eliminate all enemies to progress through the stages.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Get in touch sending an e-mail to: limaedugabriel@gmail.com
